## Source: ossf-package-analysis (bc4b306efe8e2f54c22563b5927c251b0d6d41fd58d135b63192e3c712ce04fd)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@3stripes/utils' @ 999.0.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
